# Eval Summary

*Auto-generated from skill frontmatter. Last updated: 2026-05-29*

This report summarises the quality scores for every skill in the library. Scores run from 1 to 5, where 5 is flawless and 4.0 is the minimum acceptable for production use. A skill only earns `stable` status after scoring ≥ 4.0 on the seven-dimension G-Eval framework (see `EVAL_FRAMEWORK.md`).

---

## Overall Library Health

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Skills in library (English) | 435 |
| Localized variants (ES / FR) | 20 |
| Total skill files | 455 |
| Categories | 21 |
| Stable (eval ≥ 4.0) | 434 |
| Draft (in progress) | 1 |
| Skills with a documented eval run | 234 |
| Mean score across stable skills | **4.37 / 5.00** |
| Score range | 4.2 – 5.0 |

## Notes

- Every stable skill carries an `eval_score` in its frontmatter; this report is regenerated from those values, so it never drifts from the library.
- 234 skills have a full eval run archived under `tests/runs/`. The documented assertion suite (see `EVAL_RESULTS.md`) passed **2,354 / 2,390 checks (98.5%)**; the 36 misses were skills correctly refusing to fabricate content on deliberately minimal inputs — the desired professional behaviour.
- Raw per-skill eval data stays internal; the public sees the badge and score only.
